mapper.insert: INSERT INTO boards(title, event_date, content, category1, category2, category3, image_url) VALUES(#{title}, #{eventDate}, #{content}, #{category1}, #{category2}, #{category3}, #{imageUrl})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM boards
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchTitle}, '%')
AND event_date >= #{startDate}
AND event_date <= #{endDate}
AND category1 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{category1}, '%')
AND category2 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{category2}, '%')
AND category3 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{category3}, '%')
mapper.update: UPDATE boards SET title = #{title}, event_date = #{eventDate}, content = #{content}, category1 = #{category1}, category2 = #{category2}, category3 = #{category3}, image_url = #{imageUrl} WHERE id = #{id}
